title: philema #5370
definition:
1) a kiss
 2) the kiss with which, as a sign of fraternal affection, Christians
    were accustomed to welcome or dismiss their companions in the faith
nasbUsage:

 2) the kiss with which, as a sign of fraternal affection, Christians
